title: Tick Control in Floral Park, Long Island | $125 - $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Floral Park, Long Island. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Affordable pricing $125-$325. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Floral Park's tree-lined streets, beautiful gardens, and proximity to parks create an ideal environment for ticks to thrive. Our professional tick control services protect Floral Park families and pets from dangerous tick-borne illnesses like Lyme disease. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick treatments tailored to your property's unique needs.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Floral Park and Long Island communities for years with proven tick elimination methods and eco-friendly treatment options. Our licensed technicians understand the specific tick challenges in Floral Park's residential areas and deliver fast, effective results with a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: From the charming homes near the Floral Park-Bellerose border to properties surrounding Centennial Gardens and the Long Island Rail Road station area, ticks pose a year-round threat in our community. The village's mature trees, well-maintained lawns, and proximity to green spaces make regular tick control essential for homeowners throughout Floral Park.

faqs.question: What does tick control service in Floral Park include?
faqs.answer: Our tick control service includes a thorough property inspection, targeted treatment of high-risk areas like shrubs, tall grasses, and wooded perimeters, application of safe and effective tick control products, and follow-up visits as needed. We focus on areas where ticks commonly harbor and create a protective barrier around your property.

faqs.question: When is the best time for tick treatment in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Floral Park runs from early spring through late fall, with peak activity from April through September. We recommend starting treatments in early spring before tick populations surge and continuing with monthly or bi-monthly applications throughout the season for optimal protection.

faqs.question: Are your tick control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our trained professionals. We recommend keeping children and pets inside during application and allowing the treatment to dry completely (typically 1-2 hours) before resuming normal outdoor activities.

faqs.question: How quickly will I see results after tick treatment?
faqs.answer: Most customers notice a significant reduction in tick activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. Our products provide residual protection for 3-4 weeks, and with regular scheduled treatments, you'll maintain a tick-free yard throughout the season. We also provide guidance on yard maintenance practices that discourage tick habitats.
